zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Stourton於1396年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特普雷斯頓 白 米爾福頓時，她的父親Sir John Moigne MP42歲，母親Joan Belvale45歲。她和Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1472年4月19日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布利其沃特享年76歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Stourton was born in 1396, in Preston by Milverton, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Moigne MP, was 42 and her mother, Joan Belvale, was 45. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon. She died on 19 April 1472, in Bridgwater, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76.

Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon. Elle est décédée le 19 avril 1472, à Bridgwater, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans.

ko.Preston, Somerset, England: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 프레스턴 비 미버턴
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Stourton(이)가 1396년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 프레스턴 비 미버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Moigne MP(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Belvale(은)는 45세였다. 그녀는 Sheriff Robert Hill of Devon(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 4월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브리지왓어에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.
